Package org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.behaviors.planfinder

Interface IPlanFinder

All Known Implementing Classes:
PlanFinderBestRates, PlanFinderPriority, PlanFinderRandom
public interface IPlanFinder
Find a particular provider by service.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default InsurancePlan
    chooseRandomPlan(List<InsurancePlan> options, RandomNumberGenerator rand)
    Choose a random payer from a list of payers.
    InsurancePlan
    find(List<InsurancePlan> plans, Person person, HealthRecord.EncounterType service, long time)
    Find a payer that meets the person's and simulation's requirements.
    static boolean
    meetsAffordabilityRequirements(InsurancePlan plan, Person person, HealthRecord.EncounterType service, long time)
    Determine whether or not the given payer meets the person's basic requirements.

  • Method Details

    • find

      InsurancePlan find(List<InsurancePlan> plans, Person person, HealthRecord.EncounterType service, long time)
      Find a payer that meets the person's and simulation's requirements.
      Parameters:
      plans - The list of plans (as determined by state).
      person - The patient who requires a payer.
      service - The service required.
      time - The date/time within the simulated world, in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      Service provider or null if none is available.

    • meetsAffordabilityRequirements

      static boolean meetsAffordabilityRequirements(InsurancePlan plan, Person person, HealthRecord.EncounterType service, long time)
      Determine whether or not the given payer meets the person's basic requirements.
      Parameters:
      plan - The plan to check.
      person - The patient who requires a payer.
      service - The service required.
      time - The date/time within the simulated world, in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      if the payer meets the basic requirements.

    • chooseRandomPlan

      default InsurancePlan chooseRandomPlan(List<InsurancePlan> options, RandomNumberGenerator rand)
      Choose a random payer from a list of payers.
      Parameters:
      options - the list of acceptable payer options that the person can recieve.
      rand - the random number generator to use for selecting a payer.
      Returns:
      a random payer from the given list of options.
